empathetic_output.support_response: Can you please provide me with more details on your order number so that we can look into this matter further? We will do everything possible to ensure that you receive the correct product before your wife's birthday and make sure it reaches you as soon as possible.
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I am <CUSTOMER_NAME>, I just opened the box for <PRODUCT> ordered for my wife's birthday, <PRODUCT>, and instead of the device I PAID FOR, I found a <PRODUCT> inside. This is <PRODUCT>, I paid for express shipping and expected to get the <PRODUCT>, especially since her birthday is in TWO DAYS. I demand to know what happened and I want this fixed <PRODUCT>, I want to speak to a manager if necessary.

We will do everything possible to ensure that you receive the correct product before your wife's birthday and make sure it reaches you as soon as possible.

formal_output.support_response: Our team will investigate the matter promptly and provide an explanation as soon as possible regarding why the incorrect product was delivered with your order.
